title: chenopodium hircinum subsp. hircinum
intro: Chenopodium hircinum subsp. hircinum, also known as Kelp Spire or Sea Purslane, is a perennial succulent plant species that belongs to the Chenopodiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Chenopodium hircinum subsp. hircinum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried or powdered forms, to harness its medicinal benefits.
